title: triglochin patens
intro: Triglochin patens, also known as starfruit or snake grass, is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the family Juncaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triglochin patens include treating conditions such as eczema, acne, and other skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions, and its roots are sometimes dried and powdered for use in topical ointments or poultices.
